items.title: The Hydrogen Stream: Capacity outlook grows, deals shift
items.summary: GlobalData says hydrogen capacity could reach 82.3 million metric tons per annum (mtpa) by 2030, while Topsoe has ended supply agreements with First Ammonia.

items.title: China PV Industry Brief: China adds 32.48 GW solar as polysilicon prices fall
items.summary: China's National Energy Administration (NEA) says newly installed solar capacity reached 32.48 GW in the first two months of 2026, while the China Nonferrous Metals Industry Association (CNMIA) says polysilicon prices fell by as much as 7.9

items.title: Agrivoltaics with trackers, vertical systems offer economic upside
items.summary: An industry analysis argues that agrivoltaic systems using trackers or vertical designs can outperform conventional solar on both revenues and land use, challenging conclusions from a recent German study.

items.title: Bluetti targets home backup with fridge-focused battery system
items.summary: Bluetti says its FridgePower system offers a plug-and-play battery solution designed to keep refrigerators and key household devices running during outages, without permanent installation.

items.title: Il Dl Bollette salva le centrali a carbone
items.summary: Il disegno di legge n. 2809 di conversione in legge del Dl Bollette 21/2026 è stato approvato oggi, 27 marzo, dalla X commissione della Camera. Il testo è ora all’ordine del giorno in aula di Palazzo Montecitorio per lunedì 30 marzo. Intant

items.title: ‘Be kind to yourself and patient with your journey’
items.summary: This week Women in Solar+ Europe gives voice to Irene Mihai, Policy Director at the Romanian Photovoltaic Industry Association (RPIA). She says her personal experiences show how mentorship, collaboration, and inclusive workplace practices a

items.title: Riforma connessioni, Italia Solare chiede chiarimenti a Terna

items.title: Caro energia, dodici proposte per una soluzione strutturale
items.summary: Rinnovabili, accumuli, elettrificazione e contratti di lungo termine. Sono queste le leve indicate dal Coordinamento FREE e da Energia per l’Italia per affrontare in modo strutturale il costo dell’energia nel nostro Paese. In un comunicato

items.title: UN weather agency warns of record ‘climate imbalance’ as planetary warming accelerates
items.summary: All-time high greenhouse gas concentrations in Earth’s atmosphere continue to drive heat records on land and sea, with long-lasting consequences for humanity, the World Meteorological Organization (WMO) warned on Monday.

items.title: Forests are more than a resource: How Belarus protects its vital ecosystem
items.summary: Forests cover more than 40 per cent of Belarus. At the same time, the country recorded twice as many forest fires last year compared to the year before.

items.title: War-driven energy price spikes highlight value of renewables: UN climate chief
items.summary: The disruption of global energy supplies is being felt worldwide, the UN’s top climate change official warned on Monday, as conflict in the Middle East drives oil and gas prices sharply higher – echoing the market turmoil triggered by the w

items.title: Why medicinal plants matter on World Wildlife Day
items.summary: Medicinal plants and their varied uses span from ancient medicine to modern cosmetics and pharmaceuticals amid a surging demand for more.
